zh.Chewton Mendip, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特修頓 門迪普
zh.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh.Jacobstow, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾亞可布斯托福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Bonville於1415年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，她的父親William Bonville23歲，母親Margaret Grey18歲。她於1427年5月12日之後與Sir William Grenville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年在英國可瓦爾亞可布斯托福享年50歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Bonville于1415年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，她的父亲William Bonville23岁，母亲Margaret Grey18岁。她于1427年5月12日之后与Sir William Grenville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年在英国可瓦爾亞可布斯托福享年50岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Bonville was born in 1415, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Bonville, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Grey, was 18. She married Sir William Grenville after 12 May 1427. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1465, in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Bonville est née en 1415, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bonville, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Grenville après 12 mai 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1465, à Jacobstow, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Bonville 1415 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bonville 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret Grey 18. Sie hat nach 12. Mai 1427 Sir William Grenville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1465 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Jacobstow, Cornwall, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Bonville è nata il nel 1415 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Bonville, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret Grey, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Grenville dopo il 12 maggio 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1465, nel Jacobstow, Cornwall, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Bonvilleが1415年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父William Bonvilleは23歳，母Margaret Greyは18歳であった。1427年5月12日以後にSir William Grenvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年にイギリスコルンワルジャコブストウで50歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Bonville(이)가 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bonville(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1427년 5월 12일 이후 Sir William Grenville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 코른월 재컵스타우에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Chewton Mendip, Somerset, England: Chewton Mendip, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Bonville nasceu em 1415, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bonville, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Grey, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Grenville após 12 de maio de 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1465, em Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Bonville родилась в 1415 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Bonville было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grey, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Grenville после 12 май 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности джакобстоу, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Bonville nació en 1415, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bonville, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Grey, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir William Grenville después de 12 de mayo de 1427. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1465, en Jacobstow, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
